overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail near a marshy lake, passing wooden structures and ascending through varied woodland terrain under clear morning sunlight.

events.description: character moves away from the marshy lakeside, leaving the wooden huts behind
path begins to ascend uphill away from the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the lakeside path, moving away from the wooden huts toward the forested hillside

entered.detail: rustic wooden structure with thatched roof near the water's edge
calm water with reeds and fallen logs along the shoreline
large horizontal log lying across the path edge
muddy trail with grass tufts along the edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a marshy lakeside where Geralt walks past rustic wooden huts. The morning sun casts long shadows across the dirt path as the character moves away from the water, beginning an ascent into the forested hillside.

events.description: path continues ascending with a gentle curve to the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill along the winding forest path surrounded by tall pine trees and underbrush

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead
thick green shrubbery lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a winding dirt trail through dense forest. The wooden huts and lake disappear behind as the path climbs higher, with tall pines and thick bushes enclosing the trail. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled shadows on the ground.

events.description: path reveals a steep ravine or drop-off to the left side of the trail
distant village structures become visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the forest path as the terrain opens up, revealing a ravine to the left and distant structures ahead

entered.detail: steep drop-off with water visible at the bottom, bordered by grass
faint outlines of buildings visible through the tree canopy
rocky formation emerging from the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the path continues, revealing a steep ravine to the left. The terrain becomes more varied with rocky outcrops, and distant village structures become visible through the trees ahead, indicating an approaching settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with stone walls approaching settlement

events.description: low stone wall appears running parallel to the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path beside a weathered stone wall, approaching the distant village visible ahead

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running alongside the dirt path
cluster of buildings with visible rooftops nestled in the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path running alongside a weathered stone wall on the left, with the forest giving way to more open terrain. A distant village becomes clearly visible ahead, nestled in the valley, as Geralt continues walking toward the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying marshy lakeside into the dense elevation of a forested hillside. It begins beside rustic wooden huts on a dirt path, where the morning sun casts long shadows across the ground as Geralt moves away from the water. As the character begins to ascend, the lake and huts gradually disappear behind the rising terrain, and the open shoreline gives way to a winding trail. The scene then shifts into a thick woodland environment where tall pines and dense bushes enclose the path, while the direct sunlight transforms into dappled patterns filtering through the overhead canopy.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that gradually opens into a wide valley overlooking a distant settlement. It begins as the forest path expands, revealing a steep ravine to the left and rocky outcrops that break up the woodland terrain. As the camera advances, the trees begin to thin, allowing the first glimpses of village structures to emerge through the foliage ahead. The scene then shifts to a path running alongside a weathered stone wall, where the forest gives way to open terrain. Finally, the view expands fully to reveal the village nestled in the valley as the journey continues toward the settlement.
